input_intent: gNB-CU has to prepare and send F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST" message to the candidate gNB-DU and candidate gNB-DU has to respond with F1AP "UE CONTEXT SETUP RESPONSE" message and this message has to be handled on gNB-CU for Inter gNB DU LTM Handover

validation_policy.messages: Each message in the matched mapping rule must appear in Call_Flow. Additional messages in the template are not flagged.
validation_policy.information_elements: Each non-optional IE listed in the rule for a step must exist in Information_Elements and match the rule's ASN.1 structure. Additional IEs in the template are not flagged.
validation_policy.type_fields: Mapping 'type' entries are ASN.1 constructors and type references (structure), not concrete F1AP/RRC instance values.

llm_ambiguity_review.raw_response_preview: {"reviews":[{"id":"ie_not_in_message_1_ltminformationsetup","verdict":"confirm","reason":"LTMInformation-Setup IE is missing from UeContextSetupRequestIEs container as required by the rule."},{"id":"ie_not_in_message_1_ltmconfigurationidmappinglist","verdict":"confirm","reason":"LTMConfigurationIDMappingList IE is not present in UeContextSetupRequestIEs container, violating the rule."},{"id":"ie_field_mismatch_1_ltmconfigurationidmappinglist_ltmcellid","verdict":"confirm","reason":"LTMConfigurationIDMappingList definition lacks the required lTMCellID field of type NRCGI as per mapping."},{"id":"ie_not_in_message_2_ltmconfiguration","verdict":"confirm","reason":"LTMConfiguration IE is missing from UeContextSetupResponseIEs container as mandated by the rule."}]}
